title: US indicts crypto investor over alleged $20M fraud scheme
summary: Federal prosecutors allege the South Dakota investor used false promises to raise money, repaid earlier investors with new funds and laundered proceeds through crypto exchanges.

title: MacOS malware hijacks Telegram sessions, targets crypto wallets: SlowMist
summary: A macOS malware steals credentials to hijack Telegram sessions, decrypt cryptocurrency wallets or trick users into entering their wallet recovery phrases through fake applications.

title: MSCI EM Index Heads for Correction as Chip Selloff Jolts Markets
summary: Emerging-market equities slumped, with a key gauge headed for a technical correction as mounting concerns over stretched AI valuations triggered a selloff in chip stocks across Asia.

title: Airbus Wins Major Order from Air China to Cement Regional Hold
summary: Airbus SE won an order from Air China for 15 A350-900 widebody aircraft as well as 40 A320neo series for its Shenzhen Airlines subsidiary, with a total transaction value of about $12.4 billion, according to a filing to Shanghai stock exchange.

title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
summary: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.

title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
summary: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

title: Taiwan sentences BitShine crypto exchange ringleader to 22 years in $39 million fraud case: reports
summary: The defendant reportedly led a criminal group that operated under the guise of BitShine, which was once registered with the FSC.

title: UK gang jailed over $5.4 million crypto scam posing as police
summary: The gang impersonated police officers and used convincing fake police websites to steal more than £4M in cryptocurrency from eight victims.

title: Global tech stocks fall as AI trade goes into reverse
summary: Index of US semiconductor stocks on track for its worst week since last year’s ‘liberation day’ rout

title: ‘A casino for investors’: leverage brings huge swings to world’s best-performing market
summary: South Korean regulators fear single-stock leveraged ETFs are fuelling volatility
